chapter_title.en: The Prayer for Seeking Rain (salat Al-istisqa)

text: : «إِذَا فَشَتْ أَرْبَعَةٌ ظَهَرَتْ أَرْبَعَةٌ إِذَا فَشَا اَلزِّنَى ظَهَرَتِ اَلزَّلاَزِلُ وَ إِذَا أُمْسِكَتِ اَلزَّكَاةُ هَلَكَتِ اَلْمَاشِيَةُ وَ إِذَا جَارَ اَلْحُكَّامُ فِي اَلْقَضَاءِ أُمْسِكَ اَلْقَطْرُ مِنَ اَلسَّمَاءِ وَ إِذَا خُفِرَتِ اَلذِّمَّةُ نُصِرَ اَلْمُشْرِكُونَ عَلَى اَلْمُسْلِمِينَ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.1488 - Abdul Rahman ibn Kathir narrated from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) who said: "When four things become widespread, four other things will appear: when fornication spreads, earthquakes will manifest; when Zakat (charity) is withheld, livestock will perish; when rulers act unjustly in judgments, rain will be withheld from the sky; and when agreements and covenants are broken, the polytheists will gain victory over the Muslims."
